sourceSummary.oneLine: Declaration by H&abyz Co., Ltd. that there is no conflict of interest with evaluator Kim, Sunghyun for clinical evaluation work.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical evaluation documentation by declaring absence of evaluator conflicts of interest.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no relationship or connection with Evaluator Kim, Sunghyun under listed conflict-of-interest conditions.
The document states there is no conflict of interest between the evaluator and the manufacturer.
The evaluator is Kim, Sunghyun (M.D., Ph.D.) and the manufacturer representative is Hur Namkyu.
Both evaluator and manufacturer dates are September 01, 2025.
